Detailed Description

Device Functionality - Snapshot Manager
System ID: 0x27
*
* A system that supports saving and loading firmware configurations.
*
* ### Register Map:
*
* | Address | Name              | Default Value | Description                                         | Type   | Access     |
* | --------|------------------ |---------------|-----------------------------------------------------|--------|----------- |
* | 0x2700  | Snapshot capacity | 2             | Number of available snapshot slots, read-only       | uint32 | read only  |
* | 0x2701  | Default snapshot  | 0             | Snapshot to load on system startup                  | uint32 | read write |
* | 0x2702  | Error system      | 0             | ID of system which caused the last snapshot error   | uint8  | read only  |
* | 0x2703  | Error register    | 0             | ID of register which caused the last snapshot error | uint8  | read only  |
* | 0x2704  | Error value       | 0             | ID of value which caused the last snapshot error    | uint32 | read only  |

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

optoKummenberg.registers.MiscSystems.SnapshotManager.__init__ ( self,
board = None )

Member Function Documentation

◆ GetDefaultSnapShot()

optoKummenberg.registers.MiscSystems.SnapshotManager.GetDefaultSnapShot ( self)

Gets the index of the default (startup) snapshot.

◆ GetErrorRegister()

optoKummenberg.registers.MiscSystems.SnapshotManager.GetErrorRegister ( self)

Gets the ID of register which caused the last snapshot error.

Used for debugging of the configuration.

◆ GetErrorSystem()

optoKummenberg.registers.MiscSystems.SnapshotManager.GetErrorSystem ( self)

Gets the ID of system which caused the last snapshot error.

Used for debugging of the configuration.

◆ GetErrorValue()

optoKummenberg.registers.MiscSystems.SnapshotManager.GetErrorValue ( self)

Gets the value which caused the last snapshot error.

Used for debugging of the configuration.

◆ GetSnapShotCapacity()

optoKummenberg.registers.MiscSystems.SnapshotManager.GetSnapShotCapacity ( self)

Gets number of available snapshots slots in memory.

◆ LoadSnapshot()

optoKummenberg.registers.MiscSystems.SnapshotManager.LoadSnapshot ( self,
index )

Loads the saved snapshot (configuration) into driver.

Snapshot with index 0 contains factory settings and can be used to reset the driver to factory default configuration.

◆ SaveSnapshot()

optoKummenberg.registers.MiscSystems.SnapshotManager.SaveSnapshot ( self,
index )

Saves actual configuration of the driver into memory available slot.

(all register values) Nubmer of available slots can be obtained by GetSnapShotCapacity method. Index 0 is reserved for factory settings and cannot be overwritten. This configuration can then be loaded by LoadSnapshot method. Snapshot can also be configured as startup snapshot with SetDefaultSnapShot method, driver will then start up with this configuration.

◆ SetDefaultSnapShot()

optoKummenberg.registers.MiscSystems.SnapshotManager.SetDefaultSnapShot ( self,
value )

Sets the index of the default (startup) snapshot.

Driver will start with this configuration on the next power startup.
